title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure could lead to significant data loss, operational disruption, and financial damage for organizations relying heavily on cloud services. Compromised CI/CD pipelines may also result in widespread propagation of malicious code across development and production environments.
recommended_actions: Implement strict access controls and multi-factor authentication (MFA) for CI/CD pipelines and cloud accounts.
Conduct regular security audits of CI/CD pipelines to detect and mitigate vulnerabilities.
Deploy endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions to monitor and block ransomware activity in real-time.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself poses minimal risk as described, but improper implementation, over-reliance, or potential exploitation of the tool by malicious actors could lead to exposure of sensitive dependency data or incomplete patching. The tool's popularity may also attract attackers attempting to compromise its integrity.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool's source code and security practices before integrating it into workflows.
Use the tool as a supplementary measure alongside other established security practices and tools.
Monitor the tool's repository for updates, reported issues, or potential compromises.

title: A vulnerability was detected in universal-tool-calling-protocol python-utcp 1.1.0. This affects...
description: A vulnerability was detected in universal-tool-calling-protocol python-utcp 1.1.0. This affects an unknown function of the component utcp-gql/utcp-websocket. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12210.

title: A flaw has been found in Intelbras iNVU 7016 FT 3.004.00IB000.0.T Build 2025-09-26. This impacts...
description: A flaw has been found in Intelbras iNVU 7016 FT 3.004.00IB000.0.T Build 2025-09-26. This impacts an unknown function of the file /RPC2_Loadfile/syslog/ of the component Web Interface. Executing a manipulation can lead to path traversal. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component. The vendor was contacted early, responded in a very professional manner and quickly released a fixed version of the affected

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows for path traversal attacks via the web interface, potentially exposing sensitive files or enabling unauthorized access to system resources. However, the severity is low due to the availability of a patch and the vendor's swift response.
affected_industries: Small and Medium Enterprises (SMEs) using Intelbras products
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade to the patched version provided by the vendor to mitigate the vulnerability.
Restrict access to the web interface to trusted IP ranges or internal networks to reduce exposure.
Monitor system logs for any unusual activity or signs of exploitation targeting the /RPC2_Loadfile/syslog/ endpoint.

title: A weakness has been identified in jsonata-js jsonata up to 2.2.0. The affected element is the...
description: A weakness has been identified in jsonata-js jsonata up to 2.2.0. title: A vulnerability was found in HKUDS AI-Trader up to 74caf996f78dcc0c657df8365c8544678a16e215. This...
description: A vulnerability was found in HKUDS AI-Trader up to 74caf996f78dcc0c657df8365c8544678a16e215. This affects an unknown part of the file /api/research/agents.csv of the component Research Export. Performing a manipulation results in information disclosure. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit has been made public and could be used. This product follows a rolling release approach for continuous delivery, so version details for affected or updated releases are not provided. The

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in HKUDS AI-Trader allows unauthorized access to sensitive data via the Research Export component. Exploitation could lead to information disclosure, potentially exposing confidential research data or trading algorithms. The public availability of the exploit increases the risk of malicious use.
recommended_actions: Immediately review and restrict access to the affected endpoint (/api/research/agents.csv) to authorized users only.
Apply a virtual patch or implement input validation and output sanitization to mitigate the vulnerability until an official fix is released.
Monitor systems for unusual activity or unauthorized access attempts targeting the Research Export component.

title: A vulnerability was determined in ShopXO up to 6.7.1. This vulnerability affects the function...
description: A vulnerability was determined in ShopXO up to 6.7.1. This vulnerability affects the function OrderClose/OrderSuccess/PayLogOrderClose/GoodsGiveIntegral of the file app/api/controller/Crontab.php of the component Scheduled Task Endpoint. Executing a manipulation can lead to authorization bypass. The attack can be executed remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in ShopXO up to version 6.7.1 allows remote attackers to bypass authorization mechanisms via the Scheduled Task Endpoint. This could lead to unauthorized access, manipulation of orders, and potential data breaches, impacting the integrity and confidentiality of e-commerce operations.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade ShopXO to a version higher than 6.7.1, if available, or apply any patches provided by the vendor.
Implement web application firewalls (WAF) to monitor and block suspicious activity targeting the affected endpoints.
Review and restrict API endpoint access to trusted IPs or authenticated users only, and monitor logs for unusual activity.

Monitor for unusual activity or unauthorized access within the app and implement additional security controls.

title: A weakness has been identified in Microweber up to 2.0.20. This affects the function...
description: A weakness has been identified in Microweber up to 2.0.20. This affects the function userfiles_path of the file /api_nosession/thumbnail_img of the component API Endpoint. Executing a manipulation of the argument cache_path_relative can lead to path traversal. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The identified path traversal vulnerability in Microweber up to version 2.0.20 allows attackers to access unauthorized files and directories on the server. This could lead to data leakage, exposure of sensitive information, or further exploitation of the system. The public availability of the exploit increases the likelihood of attacks.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Microweber to a version beyond 2.0.20 if available or apply any security patches provided by the vendor.
Implement input validation and sanitization on the 'cache_path_relative' parameter to prevent path traversal attacks.
Monitor server logs for unusual activity, particularly unauthorized access attempts to sensitive files, and consider deploying a web application firewall (WAF) to block potential exploits.

title: CVE-2023-54352 - WordPress Seotheme contains a remote code execution vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attack
description: WordPress Seotheme contains a remote code execution vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code by uploading malicious files to the theme directory. Attackers can access the uploaded PHP shell at /wp-content/themes/seotheme/mar.php to execute system commands and upload additional files for persistent access.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code, potentially leading to full system compromise, data exfiltration, website defacement, and the installation of persistent backdoors. This poses a critical risk to affected websites and their users.
recommended_actions: Immediately update or replace the Seotheme theme with a secure version or alternative theme that has been patched against CVE-2023-54352.
Implement a web application firewall (WAF) to block malicious file uploads and monitor for suspicious activity targeting the /wp-content/themes/seotheme/ directory.
Conduct a security audit of the WordPress installation to identify and remove any malicious files or backdoors that may have been uploaded.

title: CVE-2023-54351 - WordPress Sonaar Music Plugin 4.7 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows u
description: WordPress Sonaar Music Plugin 4.7 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts through the comment functionality. Attackers can submit JavaScript payloads in the comment parameter to wp-comments-post.php which are stored and executed in the browsers of users viewing the affected playlist pages.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2023-54351.

title: CVE-2023-54350 - WordPress Augmented-Reality plugin contains a remote code execution vulnerability in the elFinder co
description: WordPress Augmented-Reality plugin contains a remote code execution vulnerability in the elFinder connector that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload and execute arbitrary PHP files. Attackers can send POST requests to the connector.minimal.php endpoint with mkfile and put commands to create malicious PHP files in the file_manager directory and execute them on the server.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2023-54350.

title: CVE-2022-50953 - WordPress Plugin admin-word-count-column 2.2 contains a local file read vulnerability that allows un
description: WordPress Plugin admin-word-count-column 2.2 contains a local file read vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to read arbitrary files by exploiting null byte injection in the path parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to download-csv.php with a crafted path parameter containing directory traversal sequences and null bytes to bypass file restrictions and read sensitive files like system configuration.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2022-50953.

title: CVE-2021-47984 - WordPress Plugin WP24 Domain Check 1.6.2 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that a
description: WordPress Plugin WP24 Domain Check 1.6.2 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts by submitting crafted input to the fieldnameDomain parameter. Attackers can inject JavaScript payloads through the plugin settings form at options.php that execute in the browsers of administrators viewing the settings page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2021-47984.
